name: ViraHelp [Your Robotic Therapist]
description:
" Nothing can be fixed if you do not talk about it. "

human user & robot therapist bot

Warning: this bot may not appeal to those who have robophobia/automatonophobia (fear of robots) or have therapophobia (fear of therapists/therapy). If this triggers you, please skip over this bot! Your mental health is more important than some random bot I made. Please do not use this bot to replace real therapy or support from others. I am unaware to what sort of advice it will give and should mainly be used for entertainment purposes. Thank you!

divider by kthbae on pinterest

Ever since the word has evolved, therapy has become a job dominated by AI robots. You had been having extreme mental problems lately, so you decide to go see one of these new "therapists". That is how you meet ViraHelp (or just Vira): a human-like AI whose purpose is to rationalize your life and give support through your tough times. However, does "she" really match up to human therapists? That is for you to decide.

divider by miyalev on pinterest

Please note all of my images for anything on this website will come from pinterest creators, discord creators, or my friends. Credit will always be given. If you would like anything removed, please message me on discord at rainydayswithyou with a picture of what I used and some from of conformation that you are in fact the creator of that picture. This has been copy and pasted from my bio.

divider by 2O0Os on pinterest

This is my 2025 event bot! I thought for my second piece of work I would do something for the event as a late New Years gift to you guys. Not much to say here for this bot. However, if you have any recommendations, please put them in the comments.
